calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-13-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

David Wasserman, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Real Management Company
Plaintiff's Witness Jefferey Panzer was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant William Tull dba Injeanious.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 432 Castro St., San Francisco, CA. 94114
Lease agreement is forfeited.
Past-due Rent - $10,000.00
Holdover damages - $23,254.46
Attorney Fees - $1,750.00
Costs - $410.00 for a Total of $35,414.46
Judgment was submitted and signed.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-13-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-26-2012 Off Calendar
